report.summary: Cycle-close Mar 29 v3: 2 new learn pages built (passive income, beginners guide), 420 uncommitted files (+10), 147 TS errors (+2), deploy stale 4+ days — all 6 today-published pages verified on disk

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 583 unique published slugs (600 raw entries, 17 duplicates in Set), 1,233 page.tsx files on disk (+2 from last cycle)
105 legacy slugs still missing page.tsx (wallets/*, investing/best/*, taxes/*, learn/*, blog/*) — unchanged since Mar 25
147 TypeScript errors (+2 from 145): non-blocking JSX in guide files (lido-v3-stvaults, structured-data.examples, learn pages)
Today's 3 published batches verified: all 6 new slugs (telegram-mini-apps, onchain-forex, cross-chain-intents, crypto-technical-analysis + 2 queue items) have page.tsx on disk
2 new pages built this cycle: crypto-passive-income-guide-2026, cryptocurrency-beginners-guide-2026 — both scaffolded and ready
PUBLISH_QUEUE now empty (4→0 items) — 2 blocked items (wallet-security-token-approvals, restaking-comparison) noted in comments but removed from queue array
Network egress blocked — unable to verify live HTTP 200 status on degen0x.com

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: 6/6 core API routes present: fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, market-dominance, prices, defi-yields — all stable since Mar 12-14
9 total API routes implement caching headers (s-maxage + stale-while-revalidate)
7 supporting routes also healthy: cache-stats, health, news-rss, newsletter, notifications, standup-email, subscribe
No CoinGecko API key detected — still on free tier. Rate limiting risk persists at scale
No API route code changes this cycle — data layer fully stable
Network egress blocked — unable to verify live API response health or stale data

sections.title: DevOps
items: HEAD at commit 21aaf5b (Mar 25 09:26 UTC) — now 4+ days stale
420 uncommitted files (+10 from last cycle's 410): 389 untracked + 31 modified
Working tree delta: 992 insertions / 595 deletions across 31 changed files
New untracked assets include OG SVGs, learn pages, report files, component updates (NotificationCenter, WhaleAlertFeed)
CRITICAL: Deploy remains blocked. All content built since Mar 25 (77+ published slugs, new pages, OG images) not live
Production build expected to succeed — TS errors are non-blocking (JSX in unimported files)

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: 2 new learn pages scaffolded (crypto-passive-income, cryptocurrency-beginners), 0 new commits
PUBLISH_QUEUE: Emptied to 0 active items. 2 blocked items noted in comments (slug mismatches from Mar 27)
TODAY'S PUBLISHES: 3 batches promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES (6 new slugs) — all verified on disk
CARRY-OVER BLOCKERS: P0 — git commit + push (420 files, 4+ days stale). P1 — 105 missing page.tsx. P2 — CoinGecko free tier. P3 — 2 slug mismatches in queue comments
DELTA FROM LAST CYCLE: +10 uncommitted files (410→420), +2 page.tsx on disk (1231→1233), TS errors 145→147, 0 new commits
NEEDS JEFE: Git commit + push is the single highest-leverage action. 4+ days of work blocked from production and indexing
